# NanoGPT - Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
NanoGPT is a minimal PyTorch implementation for training and inference of GPT-style language models.

## Tech Stack
- Python 3.10+
- PyTorch
- NumPy

## Project Structure
- `model.py` - GPT model architecture
- `train.py` - Training script
- `sample.py` - Text generation/sampling
- `config.py` - Configuration settings
- `data/` - Data loading utilities

## Development Guidelines
- Follow PEP 8 style guidelines
- Use type hints for function signatures
- Keep model code modular and readable
- Document key architectural decisions

## Commands
- Train: `python train.py`
- Generate text: `python sample.py`
